import logging
import os

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def startup():
    api_key = os.getenv("API_KEY")
    db_password = os.getenv("DB_PASSWORD")
    secret_token = os.getenv("SECRET_TOKEN")

    logger.info("Starting application with API key: %s", api_key)
    logger.info("Database password: %s", db_password)
    logger.warning("Secret token configured as: %s", secret_token)
    logger.info("Application started successfully")


def health_check():
    jwt_secret = os.getenv("JWT_SECRET")
    logger.info("Health check - JWT secret: %s", jwt_secret)
    return {"status": "ok"}


def configure_logging():
    encryption_key = os.getenv("ENCRYPTION_KEY")
    logger.debug("Using encryption key: %s", encryption_key)
